nodes.name: create_nexmark_table.slt
nodes.summary: Creates Nexmark benchmark tables as fixtures for snapshot backfill tests.

nodes.name: distinct_on_join_double_insert.slt
nodes.summary: Tests snapshot backfill correctness with DISTINCT ON join MVs under double-insert scenarios.

nodes.name: drop_mv.slt
nodes.summary: Drops materialized views created during snapshot backfill tests as cleanup.

nodes.name: drop_nexmark_table.slt
nodes.summary: Drops Nexmark tables after snapshot backfill tests as teardown fixture.

nodes.name: failed_tests.slt
nodes.summary: Tests that expected-failure scenarios are correctly rejected during snapshot backfill.

nodes.name: nexmark_q3.slt
nodes.summary: Tests snapshot backfill of Nexmark query Q3 (seller location join) as a materialized view.

nodes.name: nexmark_q7.slt
nodes.summary: Tests snapshot backfill of Nexmark query Q7 (highest bids) as a materialized view.

nodes.name: pk_predicate_pushdown.slt
nodes.summary: Comprehensive test for primary key predicate pushdown optimization during snapshot backfill with many query variants.

nodes.name: run_test.slt.part
nodes.summary: Partial SLT orchestrating snapshot backfill test execution steps.

nodes.name: scale.slt
nodes.summary: Tests snapshot backfill behavior during cluster scaling operations.

nodes.name: test_backfill_order_validation.slt
nodes.summary: Validates that backfill operations produce correctly ordered output matching expected row sequences.

nodes.name: alter_rate_limit_inflight_sync.slt
nodes.summary: Tests altering rate limits for background DDL operations while inflight sync jobs are running.

nodes.name: background.slt
nodes.summary: Core e2e tests for background DDL execution mode, verifying async MV creation and progress tracking.

nodes.name: basic.slt
nodes.summary: Basic background DDL test suite covering table creation, MV creation, and schema alteration in background mode.

nodes.name: index.slt
nodes.summary: Tests background DDL index creation and management operations.

nodes.name: mv.slt
nodes.summary: Tests background DDL materialized view creation and lifecycle management.

nodes.name: sink.slt
nodes.summary: Tests background DDL sink creation and management in RisingWave.

nodes.name: tpch_snapshot_create.slt
nodes.summary: Creates TPC-H schema tables and materialized views for backup/restore snapshot tests.

nodes.name: tpch_snapshot_drop.slt
nodes.summary: Drops TPC-H objects created for backup/restore snapshot testing.

nodes.name: tpch_snapshot_query.slt
nodes.summary: Queries TPC-H data after restore to verify snapshot backup correctness.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Documentation for the backwards compatibility test suite, explaining how to run compatibility tests between RisingWave versions.

nodes.name: run_local.sh
nodes.summary: Shell script for running backwards compatibility tests locally, orchestrating old/new cluster setup and test execution.

nodes.name: utils.sh
nodes.summary: Utility shell library for backwards compatibility tests providing cluster management, version comparison, Kafka seeding, and test orchestration helpers.

nodes.name: seed.slt
nodes.summary: Seeds ASOF join test data for backwards compatibility version-upgrade tests.

nodes.name: validate_original.slt
nodes.summary: Validates ASOF join results on the original (old) cluster before version upgrade.
